name: report-baby
description: Render HTML/data into polished PDF/PNG reports via headless Chromium.

interface.shortDescription: Render polished PDF/PNG reports from HTML or structured data.
interface.longDescription: Local report rendering MCP server for turning HTML, URLs, or built-in templates into client-facing PDF and PNG deliverables.
defaultPrompt: Render this HTML report to PDF.
Create a polished report from this data.
Export this page as a PNG screenshot.
